notes: Start Center Recent Documents / Templates card grids drawn natively by the RecentDocsView and TemplateDefaultView ThumbnailView subclasses. Cards are Start Center application drawing over @surface, not a definition.xml control (06-containers 6.6 platform notes); the palette/shape tokens below are the card's token contract with definition.xml and drift fails closed. The Material card path owns EVERY Material-active render of each view: a populated card grid, the first-run 'create or open a document' invitation (09-start-center 9.5, empty list + no live filter), or the filtered-empty 'no match' cell (a live search hid every card). The legacy Welcome bitmap (STR_WELCOME_LINE1/2 + GetApplicationLogo) is REQUIRED-ABSENT from the Material guard block and survives only on the stock (non-Material) fallback so the default theme stays releasable. Source-declared only: no native build, card pixels or runtime interaction is claimed.

anatomy.chapter: 06-containers 6.6 (hover: @primary border; the paired soft-shadow elevation cue is deferred, so hover is currently border-colour-only)

09-start-center 9.5 (No recent documents (first run): the empty recent grid with no live filter draws a centred @on-surface title + @on-surface-variant body inviting the user to create or open a document, deliberately replacing the legacy Welcome bitmap; the Create list stays the primary affordance)
anatomy.notes: The invitation is view-supplied (RecentDocsView passes STR_SC_INVITE_TITLE/BODY); the template grid supplies no invitation, so a genuinely empty template grid draws nothing rather than the filter-implying 'no match' copy. runtime_verified:false: the centred layout and its contrast against @surface (V/A gates) remain build-bound.

anatomy.chapter: 06-containers 6.6 / 09-start-center 9.5 (filtered-empty: a live search hid every card -> full-width centred @on-surface-variant 'no match' message)

09-start-center 9.5 (Unavailable file thumbnails: a recent card whose backing file is missing dims its page preview with the archived @outline-variant/@disabled-container 'Disabled (container)' state pair while keeping the caption; an application of an existing palette pattern, source-declared only)
anatomy.notes: Availability is a per-item flag computed from comphelper::DirectoryHelper::fileExists() at RecentDocsViewItem construction (the same probe clearUnavailableFiles() runs on demand); the base ThumbnailViewItem::isUnavailable() default is false so no non-Start-Center ThumbnailView consumer is dimmed. runtime_verified:false: the dimmed contrast against @surface-container-low (V/A gates) and the mid-session file-vanish update (I gate) both remain build-bound.

views.migration_note: 09-start-center 9.5: the pre-rewrite gate (IsMaterialStartCenterActive() && !mItemList.empty()) fell a first-run empty recent list through to the legacy Welcome bitmap. That gate is now REMOVED (pinned_absent_markers) and the Material path owns the first-run render via the STR_SC_INVITE_TITLE/BODY invitation inside the guard (guard_present_markers). The Welcome bitmap is REQUIRED-ABSENT from the Material guard block (guard_absent_markers) but preserved on the stock path (stock_markers) so the default theme stays releasable. bFiltered (=!mItemList.empty()) still separates the filtered 'no match' cell from the genuinely-empty invitation, so a blank first run never shows the filter-implying copy.

09-start-center 9.5: the same pre-rewrite non-empty gate is REMOVED (pinned_absent_markers). The template grid supplies no first-run invitation (built-in templates always ship, so it is effectively never genuinely empty); when it is (bFiltered false, no invitation), the renderer leaves the @surface background blank rather than the filter-implying STR_SC_NO_TEMPLATE_MATCH copy, preserving the old first-run-stays-quiet guarantee without the base paint.
